seo.title: Asset History Calculator — what actually happened since 2010
seo.description: Free asset history calculator. Pick BTC, stocks, gold, or bonds; see what $100 lump sum or $100/month would have done since 2010 or 2016.

hero.headline: What actually happened?
hero.subtitle: Pick an asset, a start year, and a mode. See the real path your money would have taken — with the honest uncertainty bars on the noisy parts.

output.terminalRangeSubtle: Range based on best vs worst monthly entry timing: {low} – {high}
output.uncertaintyMedium: Volatility means monthly entry timing materially shifts the outcome. The range above shows best vs worst timing.
output.uncertaintyLow: Bitcoin's early-decade volatility means $100/mo entries from 2010–2012 could have ended very differently depending on exact timing. We show a range, not a single number.
output.comparisonHeader: vs S&P 500 over the same window
output.btcDcaRangeNote: For BTC starting in 2010, the DCA terminal value depends heavily on the exact monthly entry path. Public calculators differ by ±50%.

vignette.subtitle: Past is what already happened. Future is what you decide next.
